STORM SURVEY REVEALED MICROBURST WIND DAMAGE TO A MECHANICS SHOP ON JUNIPER RD. WINDS TORE ROOF OFF OF BUILDING AND THEN BRICK COVERED CINDER BLOCK WALLS COLLAPSED. THE ROOF FLEW ABOUT 100 YDS AND BROKE A TELEPHONE POLE FROM THE IMPACT.
